package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingHttpTransportPerServiceMethod() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_resource_pooling_http_transport_per_service_method"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Resource pooling. Flag new transports per service method instead of shared clients per upstream."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
